location.office_time_required: majority of employees encouraged to spend high quality time in-person via regular onsites; most teams meet once or twice per quarter for 2-4 consecutive days

level_signals: Comp range $187,900–$260,000 USD base, consistent with Principal/Staff IC
Expected to define long-term platform vision and strategy independently

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: BA/BS in Economics, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, a related technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
Experience building or managing backend platforms or infrastructure systems
Experience working with engineering teams on large-scale, complex systems
Experience defining product requirements and driving execution for technical products

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working on pricing systems, ads platforms, or similar optimization systems
Experience evolving monolithic systems into modular or service-oriented architectures
Experience working in machine learning, data science, or analytics-driven environments
Experience operating in highly cross-functional environments with multiple stakeholders

scope.surface: Pricing Platform — core primitives translating application data into loan offers (APR) across unsecured, auto, and home loan products; includes eligibility, qualification, underwriting, and offer selection systems
scope.business_model: B2B2C AI lending marketplace partnering with banks and credit unions
primary_metrics_inferred: Engineering velocity across loan product teams
Reduction of high-impact pricing system failures
Offer quality and accuracy (APR delivered to customers)
core_responsibilities: Define and execute the long-term vision for Upstart's pricing platform, enabling scalable and reusable capabilities across multiple loan products
Improve the reliability, quality, and availability of pricing systems, reducing risk and preventing high-impact failures in a business-critical system
Drive platform evolution from a complex, monolithic architecture toward modular, service-oriented systems that increase engineering velocity
Partner with engineering, machine learning, and product teams across unsecured, auto, and home lending to enable new pricing capabilities and use cases
Balance competing priorities across stakeholders, making principled tradeoffs between short-term business needs and long-term platform investments
Identify and unlock opportunities to accelerate product development by improving platform primitives and reducing dependency bottlenecks

compensation.equity_form: annual equity grants that vest quarterly; Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP) with discounted stock purchase options (US only)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($187,900–$260,000 USD base)
Fully remote-eligible in the US and Canada
Equity compensation and target bonuses explicitly mentioned
Clear product surface with well-defined ownership (pricing platform primitives)
Generous benefits package including 401k match, ESPP, wellness allowance, and productivity allowance
Mission-driven company with meaningful social impact framing
red_flags: JD states 'This role is available in the following locations: Remote' but does not confirm visa sponsorship or work authorization requirements — unclear if non-US-citizens can apply
Team operates on East/West coast time zones — could restrict fully async-international candidates
Canadian candidates excluded from ESPP and some US-only benefits; Quebec explicitly excluded from hiring
5–7 years range framing is somewhat narrow and may be used to screen aggressively
No specific mention of team size or reporting structure

Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not addressed in the JD body; marked unclear.
